snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.bigunion.get(
    id="id",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.bigunion.get(
        id="id",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi, BigUnionZero

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.bigunion.update(
        request=BigUnionZero(
            value="value",
            type="normalSweet",
        ),
    )


asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi, BigUnionZero

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.bigunion.update_many(
        request=[
            BigUnionZero(
                value="value",
                type="normalSweet",
            )
        ],
    )


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.union.get(
        id="id",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi, ShapeZero

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.union.update(
        request=ShapeZero(
            radius=1.1,
            type="circle",
        ),
    )


asyncio.run(main())
